channel.title: 甲基化 on Entropy Decrease
channel.description: Recent content in 甲基化 on Entropy Decrease

item.title: 甲基化肿瘤检测产品-1
item.description: 1. 甲基化肿瘤检测产品综述 Koch, A. et al. Analysis of DNA methylation in cancer: location revisited. Nat Rev Clin Oncol 15, 459–466 (2018). The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) data for all biomarkers with commercially available assays were analysed for differential methylation between tumour and nonmalignant samples and to determine whether or not methylation status at the
